rooms.name: Dank Cell
rooms.description: You awaken in a cold, damp cell. The stone walls are covered in moss. There is a rusty door to the north.

rooms.name: Dark Hallway
rooms.description: A dimly lit hallway. To the east is a Storage Room, and to the west is an Armory. The main exit is to the north, but a hefty Guard is blocking the way.

npcs.name: guard
npcs.description: A tall, mean-looking guard holding a spear. He won't let you pass without a bribe.

dialogs.angry: Halt! Nobody passes this door without paying the toll of one gold coin!
dialogs.happy: Thanks for the coin! I unlocked the door for you. Move along.

rooms.name: Storage Room
rooms.description: A dusty room filled with broken barrels and cobwebs. Something shiny catches your eye in the corner. The hallway is back to the west.

items.name: coin
items.description: A shiny gold coin. This could be useful for a bribe.

rooms.name: Abandoned Armory
rooms.description: Old weapon racks line the walls, mostly empty. The only way out is east back to the hallway.

items.name: sword
items.description: A rusty iron sword. It's dull, but better than nothing.

rooms.name: Freedom
rooms.description: You step outside and breathe the fresh air! The sun is shining. You have escaped!
